subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablir-Rahim! Sorrows have encompassed Me by reason of Our calling the servants unto their Lord, the All-Merciful. Verily, We called them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل رحیم قد احاطتنی الاحزان بما دعونا العباد الی ربهم الرحمن انا دعوناهم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
